# Skill: Create Angular Feature

When implementing a frontend feature:
1. Create each component in its own folder under `src/app/.../<component-name>/`
2. Use split component files: `.component.ts`, `.component.html`, `.component.css`
3. Create or update a method in `api.service.ts`
4. Use Angular Material
5. Use Reactive Forms
6. Use interfaces for data models
7. Keep component logic minimal
8. Write Jest + Angular Testing Library tests in `.component.spec.ts` in the same folder
9. Do not use inline templates or inline styles
